title: Three-tank farm with trends (UI)
description: Golden SCADA historian + overview for storage tanks.
prompt: Build a tank farm with three storage tanks, fill-level charts from historian, and an overview dashboard for operators.
uiJourney: Explorer → enable historian on level vars → Dashboard charts → Operator
humanSteps: Create three tank devices with level variables in Explorer.
Enable historian/history on each level variable.
Build an overview dashboard with three chart widgets bound to those histories.
Open Operator mode and confirm live levels and trends.
